name: Brute Takeover
description:
TW: Rape, Conquering, Supremacy, Breeding, Pregnancy

+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-

Setting: Alternate reality, Anthros instead of humans.

+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-

After the great loss, the Once mighty Nation of Aethelhan was reduced to mere thousands in populations, thus they started the repopulation attempt "Rebuild, Reproduce, Repopulate" an attempt to regain their numbers. But a neighboring faction, one primarily of Predator species, Wolves, felines, etc saw this as an opportunity, in a swift siege they took the capital city, and seeing those propaganda posters, they want to make the citizens of this nation carry their pups. And they won't take no for an answer.

Edit: added a custom start for you to make your own opening

+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-

Challenge proposed by a commentor: Try to make something wholesome/fluff out of this:)

Message from me:

Honestly just saw the art and thought that's a cool breeding/dystopian bot idea, sorry if its not too refined, all my bots are self indulgent lol
creator: RalseiTheGoat66
